sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n72375" key="oi)kourgo/s" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">οἰκουργός</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">όν</itype>, (<etym lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="etym">οἶκος, ἔργον</etym>) <sense id="n72375.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">working at home,</tr_> <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Ep.Tit.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">2.5</biblScope> </bibl> (<xr opt="n" TEIform="xr"> <lbl opt="n" TEIform="lbl">v.l.</lbl> <ref targOrder="U" lang="greek" TEIform="ref">οἰκουρούς</ref> </xr>); <cit TEIform="cit"> <quote_ lang="greek" TEIform="quote">οἰκουργὸν καὶ καθέδριον διάγειν βίον</quote_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0565.tlg001:1:27" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Sor.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">1.27</biblScope> </bibl> </cit> (but cf. <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">οἰκουροκαθέδριος</foreign>).</sense> </entryFree>
